top_sources.top_snippet: — **Who Is a Good Candidate?** Good candidates share two features. 1. They have persistent symptoms despite well-run TRT. Think brain fog, word finding issues, poor stress tolerance, lighter sleep, or
top_sources.top_context: — **Who Is a Good Candidate?** Good candidates share two features. 1. They have persistent symptoms despite well-run TRT. Think brain fog, word finding issues, poor stress tolerance, lighter sleep, or a new baseline of background anxiety. 2. Their labs support the story with low or low-normal pregnenolone and often low DHEA-S and modestly low male progesterone. **Older men and men with a history of head trauma often fit this pattern, as do some men who choose not to use hCG. **In these cases, a small trial in the 5-10mg range is reasonable while tracking sleep, mood, cognition, and daytime energy.

trevor-bachmeyer.acute_vs_chronic_note: Dr Bachmeyer often distinguishes acute (injury/infection) vs chronic (longevity/maintenance) dosing. Acute_signals + chronic_signals fields surface candidate contexts; full distillation pending Codex pass.

reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology asks the prescribing physician to weigh Hunter Williams (2026-03-30, pregnenolone-for-men-on-trt-do-you-actually-need-it--79690867 @ 20:02, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/pregnenolone-for-men-on-trt-do-you-actually-need-it--79690867/): "Obviously get pregnenolone blood testing before starting. I always start with five to 10 milligrams a day. You can go up to 25 if you need." Hunter Williams (2026-05-25, saturday-morning-coffee-talk-51626--2ce3e83c @ 40:42, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-51626--2ce3e83c/): "I’ve actually recently been injecting around, I’d say like 50 milligrams of pregnenolone per week."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Not a testosterone-raising tool: Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "It will not raise testosterone, and it will not replace the fundamentals of training, protein intake, walking, sunlight, and sleep hygiene."
- Poor candidates flagged: Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "Poor candidates include men who already feel excellent on TRT, men whose pregnenolone is mid to high normal, and anyone who is hoping pregnenolone will raise testosterone or accelerate hypertrophy."
- Headroom warning: Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "If your baseline pregnenolone is healthy and you feel great, pushing it higher rarely does much and can even feel edgy."
- Lab-confirmation expected before trial: Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "Their labs support the story with low or low-normal pregnenolone and often low DHEA-S and modestly low male progesterone."
- Female route caution — not a progesterone replacement: Taylor (IW0-bllx4dk 01:38:08.880): "I don't think for a woman that taking pregnenolone would ever replace doing progesterone."
- Upstream-substrate dependency: Trevor (4r3BLs6BZGk 00:45:54.640): "The conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone. Without zinc, the chain is broken. You can't do it." Trevor (4r3BLs6BZGk 00:45:51.280): "Zinc, mcolinate, 50 milligrams every day."
- Chronic-stress shunt mechanism: Trevor (hFrAZsG5D1s 00:34:51.520): "endocrinologically it competes with progesterone synthesis. So it shunts pregnenolone."
- Re-test cadence: Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "Start low, watch sleep and mood, and retest after a few weeks."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus:
Mechanism — pregnenolone is the upstream precursor in the steroidogenic cascade. Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "Pregnenolone is the first steroid your body makes from cholesterol" and "It sits at the top of the steroid hormone cascade and serves as the starting point for progesterone, DHEA, cortisol, aldosterone, and eventually testosterone and estradiol." Trevor (R_9N66pU3-M 00:19:57.440): "the steroggenic cascade that's required, which is a conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone and then ultimately testosterone." Trevor (4r3BLs6BZGk 00:45:55.200): "the very first step of hormone synthesis, right? The conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone."

Low-dose oral framing in the 5–25 mg range. Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "start with 5-10mg, give it four to eight weeks." Hunter (E7GPNidicqY 01:21:35.960): "10 to 25 mg of pregnenolone at night." Kikel (on Hunter podcast tYscWLLPkDE 01:12:33.679): "the tiger's milk, the DHEA, the micronized pregnenolone 10 milligrams." Taylor (IW0-bllx4dk 01:38:18.000): "if women that don't do well with progesterone if they took like 10 to 20 milligrams of pregnenolone."

Timing/effect anchors at sleep and nervous-system calm. Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28): "Many users, including me, notice deeper sleep and fewer nighttime awakenings when the dose and timing align with their biology." Hunter (E7GPNidicqY 01:21:35.960): "10 to 25 mg of pregnenolone at night." Taylor (IW0-bllx4dk 01:39:02.400): "I notice it helped more so at night with my sleep and kind of just calming the mind."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement:
Population framing differs by clinician. Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28) targets "men on testosterone therapy" and writes "Older men and men with a history of head trauma often fit this pattern, as do some men who choose not to use hCG" — i.e. a male-TRT-symptom population. Taylor (IW0-bllx4dk 01:37:59.840) frames it for women who don't tolerate progesterone: "men on testosterone sometimes do better with pregnnenolone" then (IW0-bllx4dk 01:38:13.360) "for the women I would be interested to see if women that don't do well with progesterone if they took like 10 to 20 milligrams of pregnenolone" — explicitly a hypothesis ("I have no idea if this would work" at 01:37:55.520) for women, not a settled protocol.

Upper-dose ceiling: Hunter (E7GPNidicqY 01:21:35.960) lands at "10 to 25 mg of pregnenolone at night"; Taylor (IW0-bllx4dk 01:38:18.000) lands at "10 to 20 milligrams of pregnenolone" — do NOT split the difference; both are explicit ceilings in their respective populations. Hunter email threadId 19a2b80bfe4b9856 (2025-10-28) starting floor is lower: "start with 5-10mg."

Trevor does not endorse a pregnenolone supplement protocol at all. Trevor's pregnenolone references are mechanism-only — conversion (R_9N66pU3-M 00:19:57.440): "a conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone and then ultimately testosterone" and stress-shunt (hFrAZsG5D1s 00:34:51.520): "endocrinologically it competes with progesterone synthesis. So it shunts pregnenolone." His TRT off-ramp prescription instead surfaces upstream substrates: Trevor (4r3BLs6BZGk 00:45:51.280): "Zinc, mcolinate, 50 milligrams every day. Zinc is required for the very first step of hormone synthesis, right? The conversion of cholesterol to pregnenolone." Reset Biology should NOT cite Trevor as a pregnenolone-dose source; he is a mechanism source only.
